name: Whitehaven Dreamer
description: Spoil yourself with an idyllic two-day getaway through the Whitsunday Islands aboard the deluxe Whitehaven Dreamer! This luxurious sailing experience takes you to iconic destinations such as Whitehaven Beach and Hill Inlet. Perfect for those seeking a blend of relaxation and adventure, the Whitehaven Dreamer offers snorkeling on the world-famous Great Barrier Reef, ensuring an unforgettable journey for nature lovers and adventure seekers alike.
departure_location: Coral Sea Marina Meeting Point C
includes:
Sailing to Whitehaven Beach and Hill Inlet
Snorkeling on the Great Barrier Reef
Accommodation in a Private Double Cabin with Ensuite
highlights:
Luxurious sailing experience
Visit Whitehaven Beach
Explore Hill Inlet
Snorkel on the Great Barrier Reef
Private Double Cabin accommodation
price_tiers: Private Double Cabin with Ensuite (sleeps 2): A$2720 Total
locations: Airlie Beach,Great Barrier Reef,Hamilton Island,Hill Inlet,Whitehaven,Whitsunday Island
ideal_for: Nature lovers and adventure seekers looking for a luxurious and relaxing getaway.
important_information: ['Minimum age for children is 6 years of age.', 'Any guests under 18 must be able to swim, and children must be supervised by parents for the duration of the trip.', 'Guests under 18 cannot be booked into shared accommodation, except where the group will occupy an entire shared area.', 'In other cases, the parent need to occupy the shared area and child share private cabin with the other parent.', 'Please also note that there are no 2 shared single beds together in the same area, they are spread out around the boat.', 'This is a water-based activity, for safety reasons ALL passengers must be able to swim and speak fluent English.', 'This sailing adventure is only suitable for active people.', 'A basic level of fitness and mobility is required.', 'As a guideline, guests should be able to climb a ladder easily.']
what_to_bring: ['Change of clothes', 'Swimwear', 'Toiletries', 'Beach towel', 'Insect repellent', 'Water bottles to refill', 'Camera', 'Comfortable walking shoes', 'Sun protection (sunscreen, hat, sunglasses)', 'Warm clothes/pullover for evenings (seasonal)', 'Your own alcohol (no small glass bottles)']
whats_extra: ['Soft drinks, bottled water and snacks', 'BYO alcohol', 'Luggage storage']
cancellation_policy: No shows or client cancellations made within 30 days of departure forfeit 100% of the total ticket price. A refund in the event of cancellation is subject to both our Cancellation Policy and the terms of the supplier.

name: Whitehaven Dreamer Private Charter
description: Embark on an exclusive journey with the Whitehaven Dreamer Private Charter, offering a luxurious escape to the pristine beaches and vibrant marine life of the Whitsundays. Perfect for those seeking a personalized and intimate experience, this charter caters to small groups and private parties. Enjoy the freedom to explore secluded coves, snorkel in crystal-clear waters, and relax on the iconic Whitehaven Beach. Ideal for families, couples, and friends looking for a bespoke adventure in paradise.
departure_location: Coral Sea Marina Meeting Point C
includes:
Private charter experience
Access to secluded beaches
Snorkeling equipment
Experienced crew
highlights:
Personalized itinerary
Visit to Whitehaven Beach
Snorkeling in the Great Barrier Reef
Luxurious and intimate setting
Ideal for small groups and private parties
